author: llunerti
body:
#### PR description:

This PR is meant to address the issue https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/issues/47275 for what concerns the missing parameters in the `fillDescriptions` implementation for the `MuonIdProducer` module.

#### PR validation:

Tested by running `runTheMatrix.py -l limited -i all --ibeos`
title: Updating fillDescription in MUO-POG related modules
